LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SUPERIOR CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER THE ALLEGED DEFECT WAS PATENT OR LATENT. THE PLACEMENT OF THE SWITCH WAS OBVIOUS; ITS OPERATION WAS NOT BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE 1 AND 2 ARE SUSTAINED, 3 THROUGH 8 ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
